title: Email Extract
helpOutput:
Usage: email-extract [<options>] [<file>]

  Extract email addresses from text input.

Options:
  --json               Output results in JSON format
  -s, --server=<text>  DNS server to query (default: system resolver)
  -t, --timeout=<int>  Query timeout in seconds
  -u, --unique         Only show unique email addresses
  --sort               Sort email addresses alphabetically
  -d, --domain         Extract only domains from email addresses
  -h, --help           Show this message and exit

Arguments:
  <file>  File to extract emails from (reads stdin if omitted)
